problem.title: LOAM Livox on KITTI Raw drive 0061 (200 frames, residential)
problem.question: How does LOAM Livox perform on the KITTI Raw drive 0061 (200 frames, residential)?

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Use coarser map grids and fewer outer refinement passes for faster Livox-style LOAM updates.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Use finer map grids and extra outer refinement passes for a more exhaustive LOAM solve.
